title: Weapons++
description: More tools and weapons to keep you interested in the game and keep you engaged in obtaining them.
body:
🧭 Weapons++: Solo Adventurer Edition 🛠️
Performance, QoL, and Deep Gear Progression for Solo Play.
Weapons++: Solo Adventurer is the definitive single-player modpack. It provides zero-lag performance (Sodium/Lithium) and essential QoL (JourneyMap) while fundamentally expanding progression.

This pack adds a huge arsenal of custom weapons, tools, and armor to master. Explore dynamic new biomes and dungeons filled with challenging mobs and rare resources to power your gear.

The ultimate stable and content-rich solo survival challenge.
